---
title: "Your Proposal Title Here"
---

<!-- MENTORING PLAN – 1 PAGE MAXIMUM (PAPPG II.D.2.i(i))
     Required per CHIPS and Science Act (42 U.S.C. § 1862(a)) when
     postdoctoral researchers or graduate students are supported.
     Must be uploaded under "Mentoring Plan" in the supplementary
     documentation section of Research.gov.

     The plan may differ for postdocs vs. graduate students but
     only one mentoring plan is submitted per proposal.

     If your proposal does not support postdocs or graduate students,
     delete this file and remove it from _quarto.yml and the Makefile. -->

# Mentoring Plan

TODO: Describe the mentoring plan for postdoctoral researchers and/or
graduate students. Address the following areas:

1. **Orientation.** Initial expectations, work habits, research
   documentation, and interaction with collaborators.

2. **Career counseling.** Skills, knowledge, and experience needed
   for the mentee's chosen career path.

3. **Scientific guidance.** Frequency of meetings, progress tracking,
   and feedback mechanisms.

4. **Writing and presentation skills.** Opportunities to write
   publications, present at group meetings, and deliver conference
   talks.

5. **Experience with funding applications.** Involvement in proposal
   preparation when appropriate.

6. **Mentoring experience.** Opportunities for postdocs to mentor
   junior researchers and for graduate students to mentor
   undergraduates.

7. **Networking and professional development.** Conference attendance,
   workshop participation, and connections to the broader research
   community.

8. **Assessment.** How the success of mentoring will be evaluated
   (e.g., biannual review meetings, tracking progress toward career
   goals).
